Klasse Observable

java.lang.Object
view.Observable
Bekannte direkte Unterklassen:
BoardManager
public abstract class Observable extends Object
Base class for observable objects in the Observer design pattern.

Manages a list of Observers that can be notified when a change occurs.

  • Feldübersicht

    Felder
    Modifizierer und Typ
    Feld
    Beschreibung
    private final List<Observer>
    observers
     

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    Observable()
     

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    void
    addObserver(Observer o)
    Registers a new observer to this observable by adding it to the list.
    void
    notifyObservers()
    Notifies all registered observers by calling their Observer.update() method.
    void
    removeObserver(Observer o)
    Removes a previously registered observer from this observable.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Felddetails

    • observers

      private final List<Observer> observers

  • Konstruktordetails

    • Observable

      public Observable()

  • Methodendetails

    • addObserver

      public void addObserver(Observer o)
      Registers a new observer to this observable by adding it to the list.
      Parameter:
      o - The observer that should get added.

    • removeObserver

      public void removeObserver(Observer o)
      Removes a previously registered observer from this observable. If the list does not contain the observer, it remains unchanged.
      Parameter:
      o - The observer that should be removed.

    • notifyObservers

      public void notifyObservers()
      Notifies all registered observers by calling their Observer.update() method.
